description: mapStatus in src/voicelink/webhooks.ts has an unreachable no-answer branch: cs.includes('ANSWER') is checked before cs.includes('NO')&&cs.includes('ANSWER'), so NO_ANSWER callStatus maps to 'answered'. Unanswered outbound calls show as answered in the dashboard. Classification: observational (found by scout bug-voicelink; full report in .overstory/specs/bug-voicelink.md)
resolution: Reorder the checks: test the NO+ANSWER combination before the bare ANSWER substring match (or match exact status strings). Not yet fixed — scout is read-only.

description: mapStatus no-answer branch was unreachable (bare ANSWER substring matched NO_ANSWER first); fixed by testing the NO+ANSWER combination before ANSWER. Also: VoiceLink webhook custom parameters arrive as customParameters or custom_parameters and may be a JSON string (trigger API sends a string) — parse both; link webhooks to call records via custom_parameters.call_ref first (mirrors WSS start handler); final events (ended/completed/no-answer/failed) need a wide (6h) phone-match window because they arrive after long calls age out of the 15-min window.
resolution: Fixed in commit 5f62593 on branch overstory/fixer-webhooks/fix-webhooks with tests in tests/webhooks.test.ts (7 cases). Scout findings 1-3 of .overstory/specs/bug-voicelink.md addressed.

name: add-lead-api-contract
description: VoiceLink outbound trigger API (from API Reference 2026-07-21). POST https://app.voicelink.co.in/api/v1/add_lead. Auth: Authorization: Bearer <token> (token from VoiceLink API Reference Authorize / API Keys — still needed). Body(application/json): did_number (string REQUIRED, the DID used for gating), customer_number (string, legacy single-lead phone), country_code (opt), custom_parameters (JSON string), websocket_url (uri <=255, where VoiceLink sends call audio -> set to OUR wss://.../media-stream?token=WSS_TOKEN so the outbound call connects to our server and plays campaign.wav), webhook_url (uri <=255 -> our /webhooks/voicelink?token=WEBHOOK_TOKEN), call_limit (int>=1), leads[] (bulk: each {customer_number, custom_parameters}). Response: single-lead -> outbound_queue_id; bulk -> accepted_leads (async). Validates DID assigned to user + has ACTIVE OUTBOUND WEBSOCKET BOT configured + not expired + wallet. WIRING PLAN: set VOICELINK_LEAD_API_KEY=<bearer token>; set VOICELINK_LEAD_EXTRA_JSON to inject static did_number + websocket_url + webhook_url (triggerOutbound merges cfg.extra into the body). Our /webhooks/ghl already sends customer_number. Blockers: (1) bearer token value, (2) account must be outbound-enabled (Trial Pack wallet Rs6.94 + possible KYC).

name: outbound-pipeline-working
description: 2026-07-21 FULL OUTBOUND PIPELINE WORKING END-TO-END. Flow: POST /webhooks/ghl?token=<WEBHOOK_TOKEN> {phone} -> triggerOutbound -> VoiceLink add_lead (bearer 896255|...) with did_number 919429391375 + websocket_url wss://calling-agent-v2-production.up.railway.app/media-stream?token=<WSS_TOKEN> + webhook_url .../webhooks/voicelink?token=<WEBHOOK_TOKEN> -> VoiceLink dials -> call.answered -> media-stream connects to OUR server -> campaign mode plays public/campaign.wav (response audio sent) -> call.ended. Confirmed in deploy logs. CRITICAL: phone number format = 10-digit (9146992628) WORKS; 12-digit with country code (919146992628) FAILED/misrouted (call.initiated->ringing->failed, never answered). So GHL must send 10-digit, OR normalize in /webhooks/ghl (strip +91/91/leading-0). bot_id 309 on the DID; add_lead response returns outbound_queue_id+bot_id. Wallet Rs6.94 trial - limited calls.

name: outbound-recording-complete
description: 2026-07-21 COMPLETE working outbound-recording system on calling-agent-v2. Verified: GHL webhook -> dial -> answered -> recording plays -> AUTO-HANGUP (call.ended fires immediately after 'response audio sent'; commit a4ca31b: campaign mode drain() completion does setTimeout(900ms) -> this.hangup() -> ws.close() passed from mediaStream). Phone normalization (commit 646332e): /webhooks/ghl strips non-digits + slice(-10) so +91.../91.../0... all -> 10-digit (12-digit had failed). PRODUCTION GHL CONFIG: POST https://calling-agent-v2-production.up.railway.app/webhooks/ghl?token=Z6aKYDQ7RjjLTVn3zF33UhOk body {"phone":"{{contact.phone}}"}. Server env set: VOICELINK_LEAD_API_KEY (bearer 896255|...), VOICELINK_LEAD_EXTRA_JSON (did_number 919429391375 + websocket_url our /media-stream + webhook_url our /webhooks/voicelink), CAMPAIGN_AUDIO_FILE=public/campaign.wav. Remaining ops: wallet Rs6.94 needs topup; KYC (is_verified:false) may gate scale; recording swap = replace public/campaign.wav + redeploy. main is far ahead of origin (coordinator cannot push; user must git push).
